name: Mike Stern
abstract: Mike Stern (born Michael Sedgwick, January 10, 1953) is an American jazz guitarist. After playing with Blood, Sweat & Tears, he worked with drummer Billy Cobham, then with trumpeter Miles Davis from 1981 to 1983 and again in 1985.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Jazz Band: The Legacy of Miles

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee mentions Mike Stern only in the context of his sister's name change and a TV show connection, with no indication of a direct professional or personal relationship between Jimmy Cobb and Mike Stern.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
